summary: Completed Phase 4 testing for Keeps app - Recurring invoices, Client portal, Notifications, and Multi-language features. All major Phase 4 features are working correctly with minor clipboard permission issue in automated testing.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: AI service integration issue - not Phase 4 related

integration_issues.issue: Clipboard permission denied in automated testing environment
